overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through Night City's downtown district. The player moves from a gas station area through busy sidewalks, crosses a major intersection, and continues along a pedestrian path under an elevated walkway, surrounded by futuristic skyscrapers, neon signage, and dense urban activity.

scene_state.functional_zone: gas station forecourt with neon fuel pumps

events.description: black pickup truck temporarily blocks view as camera passes alongside it
passing the red sports car and moving toward open sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking through gas station area, passing parked vehicles and security personnel

notable_agents.action: security officer standing near the red sports car, observing the area
officer taking a photo or scanning with a device

entered.detail: futuristic fuel pumps with bright red neon lighting and metallic frames
sleek red sports car with black accents parked at the pump
large black pickup truck with 'THORTON' branding on the side
tall futuristic building with large '05' signage near the top

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a futuristic gas station with distinctive red neon fuel pumps. The camera moves past a red sports car and black pickup truck while security officers stand nearby. The environment is bright and sunny with clear views of towering skyscrapers in the distance.

events.description: leaving gas station area and entering tree-lined pedestrian walkway
slowing slightly while approaching the crosswalk and observing traffic

agents.ego_description: proceeding along the sidewalk toward a busy intersection, navigating around other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: man wearing a white hat and patterned jacket walking toward the camera

entered.detail: large blue rectangular planter containing palm trees and tropical vegetation
glass-enclosed elevated walkway connecting buildings across the street
futuristic pedestrian signal with holographic display

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a palm-lined sidewalk with blue planters as the gas station recedes behind. The camera approaches a major intersection with an elevated pedestrian bridge visible in the distance. Pedestrians walk in the same direction, and the urban density increases with taller buildings and more signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection crosswalk with holographic billboards

events.description: stepping onto the crosswalk to begin crossing the wide intersection
vehicles passing through the intersection while pedestrians cross

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection with a group of pedestrians, navigating between moving vehicles

notable_agents.action: woman with red hair talking on a phone while waiting to cross

entered.detail: wide white-striped pedestrian crossing spanning the multi-lane road
massive skyscraper with distinctive red Arasaka corporate logo and Japanese architectural elements
digital signage indicating the Japantown district
tall pole with multiple traffic signals and surveillance cameras

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a wide sunlit intersection, crossing along the zebra stripes with other pedestrians. The iconic Arasaka tower dominates the skyline ahead, while vehicles move through the intersection. The environment is bustling with urban activity and massive holographic advertisements on surrounding buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: red paved pedestrian path under elevated walkway

events.description: reaching the opposite curb and entering the red paved pedestrian zone
passing under the glass pedestrian bridge, creating partial shade

agents.ego_description: continuing along the red pedestrian path, passing under the elevated bridge while navigating through foot traffic

notable_agents.action: woman in black dress walking ahead at a steady pace

entered.detail: distinctive red-colored pedestrian walkway with geometric patterns
curved orange and concrete wall with graffiti art
large digital screens displaying colorful advertisements and animations
shops and businesses with neon signs at ground level

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the intersection, the camera moves along a distinctive red paved pedestrian path. The glass pedestrian bridge passes overhead, creating a semi-covered environment. The area features street-level shops with neon signage, an orange curved wall with graffiti, and continues the dense urban atmosphere of the downtown district.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, open gas station into the dense, neon-lit heart of a futuristic downtown district. It begins by gliding past red neon fuel pumps and parked vehicles under a clear sky, with towering skyscrapers framing the distant horizon. As the gas station recedes, the camera transitions onto a palm-lined sidewalk with blue planters, moving toward a bustling intersection as the urban density and signage intensify. The scene then opens into a wide, sunlit crossing where the camera weaves through pedestrians beneath massive holographic advertisements and the dominating presence of the Arasaka tower. Finally, the movement shifts onto a red paved pedestrian path, passing under a glass overhead bridge and alongside graffiti-covered walls and neon storefronts.
